description: The Studio 1 air conditioning is not cooling and the studio reached an uncomfortable temperature during the morning show. The presenters had to run a fan. Please service the unit urgently.
short_description: Studio 1 air conditioning not cooling during show

description: Microphone 2 in Studio 1 has a constant low hum on air. It was noticeable during this morning's interview. Suspect a faulty cable or the mic itself.
The website live stream was buffering badly for listeners between 07:00 and 08:00. Several listener complaints came through the queue. Stream server may be overloaded at peak.
short_description: Live stream buffering during peak morning hours

description: The on-air playout PC in Studio 1 froze mid-show and had to be restarted, causing a few seconds of dead air. This is the second freeze this week. Hardware is ageing.
The latest show episode failed to publish to the podcast feed overnight. Listeners are reporting missing episodes. The publishing server returned an export error.
short_description: Podcast episode failed to publish overnight

description: The Listen Live button on the station website does not load the player on mobile browsers. Multiple listeners reported it. Likely a front-end issue introduced in the last site update.
short_description: Listen Live player fails to load on mobile

description: The newsroom lost network connectivity for about fifteen minutes this morning, delaying the bulletin prep. Intermittent drops point to a failing switch.
The reception door access reader failed and staff could not badge in before the early shift. Security let people in manually. The reader needs repair or replacement.
short_description: Reception door access reader not working

description: A staff member was locked out of their Microsoft 365 account after the two-factor authentication rollout. The authenticator app is not accepting the code. Needs a reset.
The Studio 2 mixing desk dropped channel 4 twice during a guest interview, cutting the guest's audio. Intermittent fault, possibly firmware related.
short_description: Studio 2 mixing desk dropping a channel

description: During a load-shedding slot the on-air studio lost power for a few seconds before the generator kicked in, causing brief dead air. Need backup power for the studios.
short_description: Brief studio power loss during load-shedding

description: Several staff cannot open the shared show-prep folder on the file server. It returns a permissions error. Started after this morning's maintenance.
The studio headphones used by guests have a faulty left ear cup with no sound. Need a replacement set before tomorrow's interview.
Office wifi is dropping in the production area, affecting staff devices used for show prep and social media. Coverage seems weak near the studios.
short_description: Weak office wifi in production area

description: A water leak from a ceiling pipe near the kitchen has left a wet patch on the corridor floor outside Studio 2. Marked as a slip hazard pending repair.
short_description: Ceiling pipe leak near Studio 2 corridor
